name: brca_omics_cosine_lr
notes: Baseline improvement 3/5: lr_schedule='cosine' applies CosineAnnealingLR decaying the learning rate from 1e-4 down to 1e-6 (lr×0.01) over epochs steps (T_max=config.epochs). The flat constant-lr schedule is known to overshoot sharp minima in the later epochs; cosine annealing lets the model take large steps early and then fine-tune as it approaches convergence, reducing the oscillation that shows up as val-loss noise near the minimum. All other settings identical to brca_omics_topk1000 (CI=0.6017).
